sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_white = [n for n in before['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
after_white = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']

print("Before UP white:", [n['boundary'] for n in before_white])
print("After UP white:", [n['boundary'] for n in after_white])
print("Board changed:", last_action_result['board_changed'])
print("Gameplay changed:", last_action_result['gameplay_changed'])
print("No impact:", last_action_result['no_impact'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
